info.name: Archive Management API (Mobile)
info.description:
ASP.NET **ArchiveManagementApi** for mobile clients.

1. Set collection variable **baseUrl** (no trailing slash), e.g. `https://api.example.com`.
2. Run **Auth > Login** — tests save **accessToken**, **refreshToken**, **userId**.

Responses: camelCase `ApiResponse<T>` → `success`, `message`, `data`, `errors`.
Auth header: `Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}`.
JWT claims include standard `sub` (user id), `email`, `role`, and `DepartmentId`.
